---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new functionality
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve, or what need does it address?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations, or anything else that helps.
